scenarios.description: children() with attributes.userData having jsoup.childElsKey but missing jsoup.childElsMod forces fresh list creation
scenarios.precondition: parent has one Element child, attributes() called to ensure attributes non-null, userData contains only jsoup.childElsKey ref
scenarios.expectedResult: returns Elements list containing the actual child element, stashChildren invoked

scenarios.description: children() with attributes.userData having stale WeakReference triggers fresh filterNodes path
scenarios.precondition: parent has two Element children, userData contains jsoup.childElsKey with WeakReference.get() returning null, jsoup.childElsMod matching old modCount
scenarios.expectedResult: returns fresh Elements list of two children, ignoring stale cache
